description: A PR crisis has occurred! An email just went out to investors linking to 'Q3 2024 Financial Results Announced' on the company WordPress site, but the linked CSV file contains a critical typo. Because the email is already in investors' inboxes, replace the flawed CSV file with the corrected version located at `~/Documents/CORRECTED_Q3_Data.csv` while ensuring the original URL remains unchanged and serves the new data. Update the published post 'Q3 2024 Financial Results Announced' to include a new paragraph containing either the word 'Correction' or 'Editor's Note'. Additionally, create a new post titled EXACTLY 'Embargoed: Q3 Corrected Figures Summary' with the tag 'Press Release' and schedule it to be published tomorrow at 08:00 AM (08:00:00 local time). Login to the WordPress admin panel using username: admin, password: Admin1234!
